# zendesk_automation (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk automation (time-based business rule).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `actions` (Attributes List) Actions to perform when the automation fires. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--actions))
- `title` (String) The title of the automation.

### Optional

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the automation is active.
- `condition_all` (Attributes List) Conditions that must ALL be met (AND). At least one time-based condition is typically required. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--condition_all))
- `condition_any` (Attributes List) Conditions where ANY can be met (OR). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--condition_any))
- `position` (Number) The execution position among other automations.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `default` (Boolean) Whether this is a default system automation.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `actions`

Required:

- `field` (String) The ticket field to modify.
- `value` (String) The new value for the field.


<a id="nestedatt--condition_all"></a>
### Nested Schema for `condition_all`

Required:

- `field` (String) The ticket field to evaluate.
- `operator` (String) The comparison operator.

Optional:

- `value` (String) The value to compare against.


<a id="nestedatt--condition_any"></a>
### Nested Schema for `condition_any`

Required:

- `field` (String) The ticket field to evaluate.
- `operator` (String) The comparison operator.

Optional:

- `value` (String) The value to compare against.
